misc: Adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season
biography: Simo, a force to be reckoned with on the greens, hails from the esteemed Hirsala Golf. Known for his fiery spirit and occasional colorful language, Simo brings a unique intensity to every tournament. Opponents often remark on his unwavering focus, though some have noted that his pre-shot routine involves a few choice words under his breath.

A veteran of the Hector Trophée, Simo is set to make his eleventh appearance in 2026. He has secured the coveted Hector Trophée three times, solidifying his reputation as a formidable pairs player. Though the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, Simo's dedication and competitive drive suggest that his pursuit of individual glory is far from over.

Ever the innovator, Simo adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season, a move that reflects his commitment to refining his game and seeking any possible advantage. Whether this equipment change will propel him to further success remains to be seen, but one thing is certain: Simo will continue to approach each tournament with passion, determination, and perhaps a well-placed expletive or two.
